title: Moody's Corporation to Host Innovation Open House: Spotlight on Moody's Analytics
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) will host an Innovation Open House with a spotlight on Moody's Analytics (MA). The hybrid event will take place at Moody's headquarters in New York City on Thursday September 14, 2023 and will welcome both in-person and virtual attendees. Sections of the event will be broadcasted and will include discussions with management highlighting MA's innovation and GenAI strategy. Senior leaders will showcase how Moody's is embracing new and eme.

title: These Banks Are About to Face (Another) Profit Headwind: What It Means for Investors
text: The failure of three large midsize banks in 2023 has regulators watching closely for signs of further risk to the banking system. A key concern is making sure the largest of this group are well capitalized enough to make all depositors whole in a failure scenario.

title: 3 Wide-Moat Stocks That Warren Buffett Loves
text: With all the economic question marks lately, investors are craving some stability. Enter wide-moat stocks.

title: Moody's Corporation Posted an Updated Management Presentation for Investors
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) posted an updated management presentation for investors on its website, ir.moodys.com, on Wednesday, August 16, 2023. This presentation reflects certain information regarding the Company's results for the three months ended June 30, 2023 as well as updated full-year 2023 guidance as of August 3, 2023, and its posting is provided pursuant to Regulation FD. Senior management may use this updated presentation during meetings with analysts.

title: Moody's to Present at a Fireside Chat With RBC Capital Markets on August 16, 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) announced today that Stephen Tulenko, President of Moody's Analytics, and Nick Reed, Chief Product Officer of Moody's Analytics, will discuss Moody's Generative AI strategy at a fireside chat hosted by RBC Capital Markets on August 16, 2023, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time (ET). The webcast can be accessed at Moody's Investor Relations website, ir.moodys.com, and a replay will be available for one year following the event. This event is condu.

title: Here's how much copy-trading Warren Buffett's portfolio yielded in 2023
text: Warren Buffett, renowned as the Oracle of Omaha, stands as a titan in the world of finance. His astute investment strategies and unparalleled insights have elevated him to the status of one of the most successful stock market investors in history.

title: Regional bank shares under fire again after credit downgrade, head for worst day in three months
text: The SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (KRE) fell by more than 3% and was on track for its worst day since May 4.

title: Moody's Announces CFO Transition
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) today announced that Mark Kaye will step down as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective September 5, 2023, to assume a CFO role at another company. At that time, Caroline Sullivan, Chief Accounting Officer & Corporate Controller, will assume the role of Interim CFO in addition to maintaining her current responsibilities. Moody's has initiated a search process to identify a permanent CFO and has retained a na.

title: US Credit Downgrade: 3 Stocks to Buy on the Pullback
text: The big news Wednesday was that Fitch Ratings, one of the big three credit ratings agencies, downgraded the US credit worthiness from AAA to AA+.
